description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On Wednesday, January 31st at approximately 4:20pm, a Nuro Prius was operating in autonomous mode driving south on Boyce Ave in 
Palo Alto. As the Prius proceeded straight through the intersection of Boyce Ave. and Fife Ave. a Honda CR-V ran the Fife Ave. stop sign 
and initiated a left turn. The Honda CR-V rear-ended the Nuro Prius, though the Nuro driver took control of the Prius and nudged right in an 
attempt to avoid impact. Both vehicles sustained de minimis damage. Law enforcement was not involved and there were no injuries 
reported or VRUs present. 
Print
Clear Form
